channel.title: Portapps
channel.description: Collection of portable apps for Windows

item.title: Stormhen portable 152.0.1-47
item.description:
Release of Stormhen portable 152.0.1-47 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the Stormhen portable page.

item.title: SmartGit portable 26.1.045-46
item.description:

item.title: Brave portable 1.92.134-100
item.description:

You can find links to download this release on the Brave portable page.

item.title: OpenVPN portable abandoned
item.description:
OpenVPN portable is not maintained anymore and is abandoned. This is mainly because portability is currently broken on this app. Feel free to fork and make your own changes if needed.
Downloads are still available on OpenVPN portable page.

item.title: Portapps 3.18.0
item.description:
• Inline the ASAR header hash generation in the core build (#437)
  • Switch direct YAML imports to go.yaml.in/yaml/v3 (#436)
  • Modernize error handling and remove legacy path helpers (#435)
  • Fix innosetup download url (#432)
  • Fix go utility error handling regressions (#434)
  • Go 1.26 (#433)
  • Bump github.com/go-viper/mapstructure/v2 from 2.4.0 to 2.5.0 (#423)
  • Bump github.com/rs/zerolog from 1.34.0 to 1.35.0 (#430)
  • Bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.36.0 to 0.42.0 (#421 #428)

item.title: DBeaver portable 25.3.2-51
item.description:
Release of DBeaver portable 25.3.2-51 is now available.
You can find links to download this release on the DBeaver portable page.
